#include <fcntl.h>
#include <limits.h>
#include <netdb.h>
#include <stdarg.h>
#include <sys/socket.h>
#include <sys/types.h>
#include <unistd.h>

void count_freeaddrinfo (struct addrinfo *res)

 MOCK_SYSCALL (ssize_t, write,(int fd, const void *buf, size_t count),(fd, buf, count))
